# 🚀 [Last  Chance] Free WordPress Speed Workshop!

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-23 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 323

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Don't forget!

Our FREE live workshop, 'Supercharge Your WordPress Website Speed
(The Non-Techie Way),' is happening on December 4th at 10:30 am
ET.

Have you registered yet?

We're sharing super simple techniques to speed up your website,
and I don't want you to miss out. Save your seat at the FREE
workshop today! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._L49kY6PnJnZsn_XKkcF0LjTxQF-fhSJlv1hW8RKfUk ) 

Here's what you'll learn:

* The importance of site speed for higher rankings and boosted
conversions
* How to test your website speed and pinpoint areas for
improvement
* Easy yet effective ways to make your website faster
* How to do a before-and-after comparison of your site speed
transformation

Want a faster website that ranks higher, converts better, and
delights your visitors?

👉 Click here to secure your FREE spot before it's too late! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._L49kY6PnJnZsn_XKkcF0LjTxQF-fhSJlv1hW8RKfUk )

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
